title: Tales From the void
description: An alpha mod meant for exploration combat an quirky mechanics, proyected to add a full dimesion in the complete version
body:
This mod is in alpha develoment some features can be broken or non functionall, please if you encounter any of this problems, join the oficial discord server so i can fix it.
https://discord.gg/2Jc3CXAn

Tales from the void is a mod that in its core is meant for adding new mechacanics to minecraft
right the addition of this mod are
- 1 armor set
- 3 new weaponds
- 2 helmet pieces with especial abilitys~~~~
- 1 tool set
- 2 new minerals
- 2 new structures
- 1 new status efecct and potion
- 2 new mobs to tame and fight
- 1 new system to make yourself stronger(in beta right now)
- 3 new structure to explore and discover
- and many joke items.......

things to wait for in the future
- new mobs
- new dimension
- 3 new bosses to face
